subcodes.title: Words to Mr. McCarthy, spoken on 1912-10-06
subcodes.first_line: These letters are symbols predicting future events. If you add these letters, each representing a number, without repeating any one of them, the sum total will be the year of the appearance of his holiness the Báb
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @prophecy and fulfillment, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
